body: Done — commit 0b82775. Task 1: restore_checkpoint_handler added. POST /v1/checkpoints/:id/restore looks up checkpoint by ID → resolves run_id → finds event-log position via checkpoint_recorded_position() → calls build_run_replay_result(). Wired in static route table. Task 2: TenantScope.is_admin field added. Set to true when AuthPrincipal is ServiceAccount{name="admin"} or System. validate_project_scope() skips tenant_id check when is_admin=true. All 4 inline tenant checks (worker report, worker heartbeat, channel_for_tenant, replay_run_to_checkpoint) updated. ProjectJson::from_request also reads AuthPrincipal to propagate is_admin. cargo check clean.
